news.headline: Oil-Dri Corp. of America's board declares quarterly dividends: $0.155 per share for Common Stock and $0.1165 per share for Class B Stock.
news.summary: Today in Chicago on March 12, 2025, the Board of Directors of Oil-Dri Corporation of America announced quarterly cash dividends. They declared $0.155 per share for the Company's Common Stock and $0.1165 per share for the Company's Class B Stock. The Company's Common Stock trades on the NYSE under the symbol ODC.

news.headline: Fossil Group, Inc. appoints Randy Greben as CFO, replacing Andrew Skobe. Effective March 17, 2025.
news.summary: In Richardson, Texas, on March 12, 2025, Fossil Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: FOSL) revealed the selection of Randy Greben as their new Chief Financial Officer, commencing on March 17. Greben takes over from Andrew Skobe, who was serving as the Interim Chief Financial Officer. This change in leadership marks a significant development for the company.

news.headline: Equitable Bank lowers prime rate by 25 basis points to 4.95% from 5.20%. Concentra Bank follows suit.
news.summary: In a recent development on March 12, 2025, Equitable Bank, known as Canada's Challenger Bank™, revealed a substantial decrease in its prime lending rate. The bank has decided to lower the rate by 25 basis points, bringing it down to 4.95% from the previous 5.20%. Furthermore, Equitable Bank's subsidiary, Concentra Bank, is also following suit by reducing its prime rate. These adjustments are anticipated to have a significant impact on borrowing and lending activities within the financial sector.

news.headline: Trivest sells HighGround Restoration Group to Knox Lane; terms undisclosed. Leading company in water damage restoration.
news.summary: A private equity firm, Trivest Partners LP, has sold its portfolio company HighGround Restoration Group, Inc. to Knox Lane. HighGround, based in Dallas, TX, specializes in water damage mitigation and restoration services nationwide. The sale details have not been disclosed. Trivest Discovery Fund I oversaw this transaction, focusing on investing in founder and family-owned businesses. The completion of this sale marks a significant development in Trivest's investment strategy.

news.headline: Ceraweek: US oil executives to meet Trump at the White House next week, to discuss tariffs, trade, and LNG exports - American Petroleum Institute.

electroCore reports record net sales of $25.2M in 2024, up 57% from 2023. Net loss decreases by 37% to $11.9M. Operating cash use down 53% to $7.0M, with $12.2M in cash reserves. Company aims for growth and profitability with expanded market presence.
news.summary: ElectroCore, Inc. reported record full year 2024 net sales of $25.2 million, a 57% increase from 2023. This growth was driven by an 85% increase in Rx gammaCoreTM sales to the VA and DoD, and a 174% increase in TruvagaTM sales. The company's net loss for 2024 was $11.9 million, a 37% reduction from 2023, with net cash used in operating activities decreasing by 53%. Cash, cash equivalents, restricted cash, and marketable securities totaled $12.2 million at the end of 2024. Gross profit for 2024 was $21.4 million with a gross margin of 85%. Total operating expenses were $33.6 million, and GAAP net loss improved to $11.9 million from $18.8 million in 2023. The company is set to host a conference call and webcast on March 12, 2025. CEO Dan Goldberger is optimistic about future growth and profitability, aiming to expand market presence and addressable market through partnerships.

news.headline: Fossil Group reported Q4 net sales of $342M, down 19%, with a loss of $16.3M; announced a turnaround plan with financial targets for 2027: net sales >$800M, adjusted operating income mid-single digits.
news.summary: Fossil Group, Inc. announced fourth quarter 2024 financial results with worldwide net sales of $342 million and an operating loss of $16.3 million. They reported a decrease in sales due to strategic exits and optimization actions, alongside SG&A savings of $100 million expected in 2025. The company's gross margin improved to 53.9%, with free cash flow of $30 million in Q4. They aim for financial targets by 2027 including net sales of over $800 million and positive free cash flow. Full year 2024 saw net sales of $1.1 billion and an operating loss of $103.9 million. The outlook for 2025 includes a mid to high teens decline in net sales and a negative low single-digit adjusted operating income margin. The Company aims to focus on its core, reduce costs, and strengthen its balance sheet.

news.headline: AAR CORP. signs component repair deal with Cebu Pacific Air for nacelle maintenance.
news.summary: AAR CORP, a prominent aviation services provider catering to commercial and government operators, MROs, and OEMs, recently disclosed a significant deal on March 12, 2025. The company revealed a multi-year contract with Cebu Pacific Air for nacelle maintenance, repair, and overhaul services. This collaboration signifies a major partnership in the industry. AAR CORP's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AIR, showcasing its strong presence in the market. This agreement underlines the company's commitment to offering top-notch services to its clients.

news.headline: Phreesia reports Q4 fiscal 2025 results; CEO Chaim Indig excited about new products. Please visit Phr for more info.
news.summary: Phreesia, Inc., an all-remote company based in Wilmington, Delaware, disclosed its financial outcomes for the fiscal fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on January 31, 2025. The company, traded on the NYSE under the symbol PHR, expressed contentment with its robust performance during this period. CEO and Co-Founder Chaim Indig conveyed enthusiasm regarding the recent product launches that aim to enhance medication adherence and overall experiences for patients and providers.

news.headline: Synopsys SNUG Silicon Valley 2025 conference to feature talks from Arm, OpenAI, and Microsoft executives. Keynotes via livestream.
news.summary: A conference spanning two days is set to delve into the future of artificial intelligence (AI) and intelligent systems. Participants will have the opportunity to join via Livestream to hear keynote addresses from the CEO of Synopsys and the Head of Hardware at OpenAI. The event, hosted by Synopsys Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SNPS, is scheduled for March 12, 2025, in Sunnyvale, California. This annual flagship user group conference, SNUG Silicon, promises to offer valuable insights and discussions on the latest trends and developments in AI and intelligent systems.

news.headline: Adobe reports record Q1 results for FY2025, with revenue exceeding $5 billion. Customer-focused strategy aims for future growth.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE) announced its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025 ending on February 28, 2025. The company reaffirmed its FY2025 targets and shared insights into its customer-focused strategy prior to the upcoming Adobe Investor Meeting at Adobe Summit. Chairman Shantanu Narayen highlighted the importance of customer-focused innovation for Adobe's future success, emphasizing the development of new offerings for creators, marketing professionals, business professionals, and consumers.

news.headline: Purple Innovation to announce Q4 and full-year 2024 results on March 13, 2025 - NASDAQ: PRPL.
news.summary: Purple Innovation, Inc., a renowned comfort innovation company recognized for developing the "World's First No Pressure™ Mattress," is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on Thursday, March 13, 2025. The company, trading on NASDAQ under the symbol PRPL, will be releasing these crucial figures to the public on that date.

news.headline: FIS to present at Bank of America Electronic Payments Symposium on Mar. 18, 2025, at 10:40 am ET. Stock symbol: FIS (NYSE). Website: www.fisglobal.com.
news.summary: Jacksonville, Florida-based FIS, a leading financial technology company traded on NYSE under the ticker symbol FIS, will be participating in the Bank of America Electronic Payments Symposium on March18, 2025, at 10:40 am ET. A live audio webcast of the presentation will be available along with a replay on FIS’ website, www.fisglobal.com. FIS offers financial solutions to various entities including financial institutions, businesses, and developers, striving to enhance the financial technology landscape.

news.headline: Spirit Airlines emerges from Chapter 11 with new financing, significantly deleveraged, aiming for profitability and enhanced guest experience.
news.summary: Spirit Aviation Holdings, Inc. has successfully emerged from Chapter 11 with substantial debt reduction and secured new financing to aid in achieving profitability and sustaining long-term success. The parent company of Spirit Airlines, LLC, headquartered in DANIA BEACH, Fla., announced this development on March 12, 2025. The company's efforts have allowed for a smoother financial position as they work towards revitalizing operations.

news.headline: Vivek Kundra appointed Chief Operating Officer at The Trade Desk, to oversee global operations.
news.summary: The Trade Desk, a prominent advertising technology company based in Ventura, California, has appointed Vivek Kundra as its new Chief Operating Officer starting March 31st. Kundra will be responsible for managing global operations and enhancing operational efficiency companywide. With a robust background in driving operational standards in fast-growing software companies like Salesforce, Kundra's expertise will be valuable in his new role. He will work closely with CEOs to ensure streamlined operations.

news.headline: TopBloc named 2025 Workday Business Impact Partner of the Year, celebrating their record number of Workday implementations.
news.summary: In Chicago, TopBloc, an ASGN brand and a prominent Workday Services Partner, has recently been honored with the title of 2025 Workday Partner of the Year for Business Impact. This award signifies TopBloc's exceptional performance in producing tangible and transformative results for customers, serving as a key driver of significant change. The accolade was presented during Workday’s Sales Kickoff Event, where TopBloc stood out for completing a remarkable milestone of Workday implementations. This recognition solidifies TopBloc's position as a leader in delivering successful outcomes for clients.

news.headline: Avidity Biosciences will present Phase 1/2 EXPLORE44 trial data at 2025 MDA Conference by Aravindhan Veerapandiyan.
news.summary: Dr. Aravindhan Veerapandiyan, an MD and Associate Professor of Pediatrics at the University of Arkansas for Medical Sciences and Arkansas Children's Hospital, who is also an investigator in the EXPLORE44® trial, will reveal the key findings from the Phase 1/2 EXPLORE44 trial focusing on del-zota at the 2025 MDA Clinical & Scientific Conference.

news.headline: Fathom Holdings reports 24% increase in revenue for Q4 and full year 2024. Stock traded as FTHM.
news.summary: A national company, Fathom Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: FTHM), based in CARY, N.C., reported a substantial 24% increase in revenue compared to the previous year. The company offers a comprehensive real estate services platform that includes residential brokerage, mortgage, and title services.

news.headline: SentinelOne (NYSE: S) reports Q4 and FY 2025 financial results. CEO expects to surpass $1 billion in ARR and revenue.
news.summary: Mountain View, California - SentinelOne, Inc. reported their financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025, ending on January 31, 2025. CEO Tomer Weingarten announced that they had a strong finish to the fiscal year due to solid execution and increased adoption of their platform solutions. They are set to exceed $1 billion in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) and total revenue for the year, a significant milestone in their growth trajectory. Over the past ten years, they have patented top machine learning technology.

news.headline: Realty Income increases common stock monthly dividend to $0.2685 per share from $0.2680 per share, marking 130th consecutive increase.
news.summary: In a press release dated March 12, 2025, Realty Income Corporation, listed on the NYSE as O and known as The Monthly Dividend Company®, revealed a rise in its monthly cash dividend for common stock. The new dividend amount is set at $0.2685 per share, reflecting an uptick from the prior $0.2680 per share. Shareholders can anticipate receiving this dividend in the upcoming payment cycle.

news.headline: Cognition Therapeutics granted extension by Nasdaq to meet minimum bid price; given 180 days to reach $1/share, deadline: Mar 11, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Cognition Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CGTX), a company focused on developing treatments for neurodegenerative disorders, received notification from Nasdaq on September 12, 2024 that its common stock had traded below $1.00 per share for 30 consecutive business days. Subsequently, Cognition had 180 days to raise its stock price to at least $1.00 per share for 10 consecutive business days to comply with Nasdaq's regulations. Unfortunately, the deadline for meeting this requirement passed on March 11, 2025.

news.headline: Solésence launches new investor relations website, creating hub at ir.solesence.com for beauty investors and partners.Characters: 121
news.summary: Solésence, Inc., a top provider of healthcare solutions in beauty and life sciences, unveiled its new investor relations website on March 12, 2025. The website, located at ir.solesence.com, serves as a central platform for investors and partners in the beauty industry to obtain financial details about the company and its groundbreaking skin health products. Solésence, Inc. is listed as OTCQB: NANX.

news.headline: NextNav Inc. reports Q4 and full year 2024 results, highlighting success in demonstrating effectiveness of their 5G PRS-based PNT solution.
news.summary: New lab and field demonstrations have proven the effectiveness of NextNav's 5G PRS-based PNT solution. The tests showcased the system's accuracy and reliability, with impressive results garnered from various scenarios. This significant development demonstrates the solution's capability to provide precise positioning for a wide range of applications. The successful trials mark a crucial milestone for NextNav, solidifying their position as a leader in the field of advanced positioning technologies. The solution's promising performance in both controlled lab environments and real-world field tests further underscores its potential in enabling precise navigation in diverse settings. This achievement highlights NextNav's commitment to innovation and their dedication to delivering cutting-edge solutions that meet the evolving needs of industries reliant on accurate positioning data. With these successful demonstrations, NextNav's 5G PRS-based PNT solution emerges as a game-changer in the realm of positioning technology.

news.headline: Howard Hughes Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HHH) extends standstill agreement with Pershing Square Capital Management L.P. until April 7, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in The Woodlands, Texas, Howard Hughes Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HHH) revealed a prolongation of the standstill deal with Pershing Square Capital Management L.P. The agreement will be active until April 7, 2025, barring additional extensions.

news.headline: Anika's 2024 financials released: Q4 and full year results unveiled.
news.summary: A recent report states that 2 million new cases of a viral outbreak have been confirmed in the country. This marks a significant increase in the total number of cases, which is now over 10 million. The death toll has also risen to 50,000 as a result of the outbreak. Hospitals are overwhelmed with patients, leading to a shortage of medical supplies and personnel. The government has implemented strict measures to control the spread of the virus, including a nationwide lockdown and mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces. The situation remains critical as health officials warn of a possible second wave of infections.

news.headline: Company announces Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results, with revenue meeting expectations and focus on profitability.
news.summary: The revenue of the company is meeting expectations, showing promising results for growth. Efforts are being made to improve profitability and increase margins, indicating a positive trajectory for the business. The company is on track with its financial goals and is focused on driving success in the market. The revenue numbers are in line with projections, showcasing stability and potential for further expansion. Overall, the company is making consistent progress towards enhancing its financial performance and achieving sustainable growth.

news.headline: Ampco-Pittsburgh Corp (NYSE: AP) reported net sales of $100.9 million for Q4 2024, compared to $108.1 million in Q4 2023.
news.summary: In Carnegie, Pennsylvania, Ampco-Pittsburgh Corporation (NYSE: AP) announced their financial results. They disclosed net sales figures of $100.9 million and $418.3 million for the three and twelve months ending on December 31, 2024. In comparison, for the same periods ending on December 31, 2023, the company reported $108.1 million and $422.3 million in net sales, indicating a decrease. The decline in sales for the fourth quarter of 2024 was largely a result of reduced mill roll shipment volumes due to weaker end market demand.

news.headline: Developing countries show zero reluctance in their actions on climate change.
Blue Hat Interactive to undergo 1-for-100 reverse stock split starting March 17, 2025. Currently has 493,820,989 shares outstanding. Trading under "BHAT" on Nasdaq.
news.summary: XIAMEN, China - On March 12, 2025, Blue Hat Interactive Entertainment Technology ("Blue Hat" or the "Company") (NASDAQ: BHAT) announced plans for a 1-for-100 reverse stock split of its ordinary shares to take effect on Monday, March 17, 2025. The Company currently has 493,820,989 ordinary shares issued and outstanding before the split. Trading under the symbol “BHAT” will continue on the Nasdaq Capital Market following the split. The new CUSIP number for the ordinary shares post-split will be G1329V 114.

news.headline: Oportun (OPRT) to present at Sidoti March Virtual Investor Conference on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Oportun (Nasdaq: OPRT), a San Carlos-based financial services company, revealed their participation in the forthcoming Sidoti March Virtual Investor Conference.

news.headline: Veea Inc (NASDAQ: VEEA) to join 37th Annual Roth Conference in Dana Point, CA on Mar 16-18, 2025 with CEO Allen Salmasi.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, tech company Veea Inc. (NASDAQ: VEEA) revealed that Allen Salmasi, co-founder and CEO, will join the 37th Annual Roth Conference happening from March 16-18, 2025 in Dana Point, CA. Veea specializes in advanced Multiaccess Edge Computing (MEC) coupled with AI-enhanced cybersecurity and edge solutions. This conference serves as a platform for Salmasi to engage with industry experts and investors.

news.headline: Winnebago Industries (NYSE: WGO) to reveal Q2 fiscal 2025 results on March 27, 2025, with a conference call at 9:00 a.m. CT.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Winnebago Industries, Inc. announced that they will be releasing their second quarter fiscal 2025 financial results before the New York Stock Exchange opens on Thursday, March 27, 2025. The conference call will take place at 9:00 a.m. CT and will be led by President and CEO Michael Happe, along with CFO Bryan Hughes. Winnebago Industries, a renowned manufacturer of outdoor recreation products and listed on NYSE as WGO, is gearing up for this significant financial update.

news.headline: Integer Holdings Corporation to offer $750.0 million convertible senior notes due 2030 in PLANO, Texas. (char count: 92)
news.summary: Integer Holdings Corporation, based in Plano, Texas, informed today their plans to offer $750.0 million aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes due 2030. The offering is subject to market conditions. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ITGR.

news.headline: Berry Corporation announced Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, with quarterly dividend of $0.03 per share. Conference call on March 13 to discuss 2025 outlook.
news.summary: Dallas-based company Berry Corporation (BRY) revealed its financial outcomes for the last quarter and full year of 2024 alongside declaring a quarterly dividend of $0.03 per share. Interested parties can access a detailed presentation on the company's performance at www.bry.com. The firm is set to conduct a conference call and webcast on Thursday, March 13, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. CT to delve into the results of Q4 and FY 2024, as well as share insights on their forecast for 2025. Further information on the call is available in the announcement.

news.headline: Limoneira Co. reports Q1 fiscal 2025 results, CEO highlights revenue optimization.
news.summary: In Santa Paula, California, Limoneira Company (Nasdaq: LMNR), a company involved in citrus growing, packing, selling, and marketing along with agribusiness and real estate development, disclosed their financial outcomes for the quarter ending January 31, 2025. CEO Harold Edwards noted the advantages gained from enhancing the revenue mix and shifting towards an asset-centered strategy.

news.headline: Brilliant Earth exceeded expectations in Q4 2024 with net sales at high end of range, 10% total order growth, 59.6% gross margin, $0.04 adjusted diluted EPS. Q1 and full year 2025 guidance provided.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, the delivered net sales of the company reached the higher end of the projected range. The quarter saw a notable 10% year-over-year growth in total orders. Additionally, profitability exceeded expectations as the gross margin for Q4 2024 increased by 90 basis points compared to the previous year, reaching 59.6%. The company reported a GAAP diluted EPS of $0.02 for the same quarter, along with an adjusted diluted EPS of $0.04. Looking ahead, the company has provided guidance for the first quarter and the full year of 2025.

news.headline: BeautyHealth Company exceeds net sales and Adjusted EBITDA guidance for Q4 and full year 2024.
news.summary: In the latest update, The Beauty Health Company disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company saw its Net Sales and Adjusted EBITDA surpassing anticipated figures, indicating a strong financial performance during this period. The specific numbers for the net sales and adjusted EBITDA were not provided in this summary.

news.headline: Tilly's Inc. (NYSE: TLYS) reports disappointing Q4 results for fiscal 2024, plans to make changes for sales growth in 2025.
news.summary: In California, Tilly’s, Inc. revealed financial figures for Q4 of fiscal 2024 ending on February 1, 2025. The Company, listed as TLYS on NYSE, expressed disappointment in their Q4 performance. Hezy Shaked, the President and CEO, mentioned implementing changes in merchandising to boost future sales. The focus for fiscal 2025 is on stabilizing and expanding sales after experiencing challenges in Q4.

news.headline: RCM Technologies, Inc. reports Q4 2024 and FY results; period ended Dec 28, 2024. NasdaqGM: RCMT. Enhanced operational solutions.
news.summary: In Pennsauken, New Jersey, on March 12, 2025, RCM Technologies, Inc. (NasdaqGM: RCMT) shared their financial outcomes for the periods ending on December 28, 2024. The company, known for offering engineering, healthcare, and IT services to boost operational efficiency, reported its figures for both the thirteen-week and fifty-two-week durations.

news.headline: AEO Inc. reports strong Q4 and FY2024 results, with growth in operating profit and positive momentum. Jay Schottenstein optimistic about FY2025 outlook.
news.summary: American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. (NYSE: AEO) based in Pittsburgh recently revealed its financial performance for the quarter and fiscal year ending February 1, 2025. The company reported notable advancements in their Powering Profitable Growth Plan throughout 2024. AEO's Executive Chairman of the Board, Jay Schottenstein, highlighted the robust operating profit growth achieved during this period. The company witnessed favorable progress across various brands and channels, emphasizing disciplined expense control and operational efficiencies.

news.headline: Firm unveils Q4 and FY 2024 financial outcomes, with significant figures.
news.summary: An international study found that around 25% of households in developed countries have experienced food insecurity at some point in the last year. This equates to over 88 million households struggling to access sufficient and nutritious food. The research also revealed that the largest proportion of food insecure households are in Europe and Central Asia, at 8.5%, followed by North America at 6.5%. The study emphasizes the need for targeted interventions and policies to address the widespread issue of food insecurity in these regions.

news.headline: ElectroCore reports 2024 net sales of $25.2M, up 57% from 2023, driven by growth in Rx gammaCoreTM and TruvagaTM.
news.summary: In 2024, net sales reached a record-breaking $25.2 million, marking a substantial 57% surge from the $16.0 million achieved in 2023. This robust growth was propelled by an 85% annual increase in Rx gammaCoreTM sales within the United States Department of Veteran Affairs and United States Department of Defense. Additionally, sales of TruvagaTM experienced an impressive surge of 174% during this period.

news.headline: Ingredion Incorporated announces $0.80 per share quarterly dividend on common stock, payable on April 22, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Ingredion Incorporated's board of directors announced a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per share for the company's common stock (NYSE: INGR). This dividend will be paid out on April 22, 2025, to stockholders recorded on April 1, 2025.

news.headline: AudioEye reports record Q4 and full year 2024 results with 24% YoY revenue growth, aiming for $41-42 million in 2025 revenue.
news.summary: For the thirty-sixth straight time, AudioEye, Inc. (Nasdaq: AEYE) has recorded a period of record revenue. In the fourth quarter, there was a noteworthy 24% year-over-year revenue surge along with a 24% adjusted EBITDA margin. Looking ahead, the company anticipates revenue for 2025 to fall between $41 million and $42 million, showcasing an 18% growth at the midpoint. This information was disclosed in Tucson, Ariz. on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Collective Mining reports best drill hole with 75.80m at 8.01 g/t Gold Equivalent in new Ramp Zone; another hole 20.30m @ 6.68 g/t.
news.summary: In a recent drilling update, drill hole APC105-D1 revealed an impressive 75.80-meter section with a gold equivalent grade of 8.01 g/t, marking the longest and most promising intercept in terms of grade accumulation (grams x meters) at the new Ramp Zone discovery. Another notable finding was in drill hole APC103-D3, which showed an intersection of 20.30 meters with a gold equivalent grade of 6.68 g/t. These results signify significant developments in the exploration efforts at the site.

news.headline: Michael J. Loparco joins Sanmina's Board of Directors on March 10, 2025; company is NASDAQ-listed under SANM.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in San Jose, California, Sanmina Corporation (NASDAQ: SANM), a prominent integrated manufacturing solutions company, reported the addition of Michael J. Loparco to its Board of Directors as of March 10, 2025. This brings the total number of board members to __.

news.headline: Allakos Inc., a biotech company (Nasdaq: ALLK) reports financial results for Q4 ended Dec 31, 2024 in San Carlos, Calif.
news.summary: In San Carlos, California, on March 12, 2025, Allakos Inc. (Nasdaq: ALLK), a biotech firm focusing on antibodies for treating various diseases, disclosed its business progress and financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Alpha Tau reports strong financial results for 2024. Trials on Alpha DaRT® for pancreatic cancer show high disease control rate and impressive overall survival.
news.summary: Preliminary data from three clinical trials investigating the effectiveness of Alpha DaRT® for pancreatic cancer treatment have revealed a noteworthy disease control rate. Sub-group analyses demonstrated a remarkable overall survival rate, with no significant safety concerns reported.

news.headline: RFMW partners with CoolCAD Electronics for high-power SiC devices, expanding wide bandgap solutions.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, RFMW, a leading distributor of power management along with RF and microwave components for the electronics sector, has revealed a key partnership with CoolCAD Electronics. This collaboration aims to enrich RFMW’s collection of high-power and high-voltage silicon carbide (SiC) semiconductor devices. By joining forces, RFMW can now provide customers with cutting-edge wide bandgap solutions, ensuring top-tier performance, reliability, and efficiency.

news.headline: Performant Healthcare, Inc. reported Q4 2024 total revenues of $34.8M, healthcare revenues of $34.3M, and a net loss of $0.5M.
news.summary: Performant Healthcare, Inc., a top healthcare payment integrity services provider, announced its financial results for Q4 and full year ending on December 31, 2024. In Q4 2024, the company reported total revenues of $34.8 million, up from $32.6 million in the previous year. Healthcare revenues were $34.3 million compared to $31.1 million. The net loss amounted to $0.5 million or $(0.01) per share for the quarter.
